headline: Honeywell CEO explains why most of its products are 'AI-proof'
summary: Honeywell International (HON) chairman and CEO Vimal Kapur sits down with Yahoo Finance Anchor Julie Hyman at the CERAWeek 2026 conference to talk about the mass adoption of AI and how AI programs fit into Honeywell's business model.
